description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, rectilinear design, characterized by flat roofs and a combination of brick and white exterior surfaces. The structure is set on a rectangular green plot, with a prominent front entrance accessed by a set of steps and a small porch area. The building is composed of several interconnected volumes, some of which extend outward, creating a dynamic facade. Windows are distributed asymmetrically, with larger openings on the sides and rear, and smaller ones on the front. A detached garage or auxiliary structure is positioned at the rear of the property, separated from the main living area. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, brick and white exterior, and a detached rear structure on a green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance steps, small porch, and the linear arrangement of the bungalow's volumes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, flat roofs, and the detached rear structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large window openings, and the separation between the main building and the auxiliary structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brickwork, side windows, and the relationship between the main and detached structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
